environment.dotnetSdk: 10.0.301 (pinned by global.json, rollForward latestPatch); test runtime .NET 10.0.10
environment.supplementaryLocalChecks: macOS arm64, .NET SDK 10.0.301, EnableWindowsTargeting=true Release build (0 warnings, 0 errors) and scratch net10.0 xunit runs of the non-WPF sources (slice 1: 86/86; slice 2: 123/123, run 4 times without flakes); the WPF test assembly runs only on Windows CI

validatedActions.action: Release build and static analysis on Windows

validatedActions.details: M6 coverage (90 new tests): exact REPORT_SCHEMA.md CSV header order, RFC 4180 escaping (commas, quotes, CR, LF, Arabic/Unicode names), formula-injection neutralization vectors, UTF-8 output, FailedFiles.csv filtering to Failed and Unsupported rows, TransferSummary.json field presence and IsArchiveComplete rules (true only for Completed/CompletedWithWarnings), per-run report isolation (never overwrite or append to another run), report redaction (token-like strings, temporary download URLs, raw Graph bodies, stack traces absent), per-run Serilog log sink behavior, report generation wired into orchestrator finalization without masking run outcomes, report failure never changes the run result, ViewModel workflow state machine (sign-in, source input, destination, scan, confirm, copy, terminal), scan invalidation on source edit and destination change, Start Copy enable rules (no scan, stale scan, no confirmation; scan currency revalidated before scheduling), progress counts and indeterminate behavior while totals are unknown, bounded recent-activity list (100 entries, oldest dropped), cancel during scan and copy, exact terminal-state display with Incomplete stating the archive is not complete, Open Report and Open Destination enable rules and shell calls, sign-out semantics, error display shape, and UI redaction vectors (tenant IDs, drive IDs, JWT shapes, temporary URLs, Bearer headers, client secrets never rendered), WPF shell construction, and DI registration.
111 files scanned for 15 prohibited patterns. No matches.

earlierRuns.note: Slice-1 commit e031cea (report engine) passed all checks; intermediate signal, not the validated commit.

reportSchemaCompliance.csvNeutralizationPolicy: Leading apostrophe prefixed to values beginning with =, +, -, @, tab, CR, or LF, applied before RFC 4180 escaping (recorded as decision D-040).
reportSchemaCompliance.perRunIsolation: All report files are written with FileMode.CreateNew; a later run can never overwrite or append to another run's files.
reportSchemaCompliance.operationalAuthority: SQLite remains the operational source; CSV and JSON are audit outputs only.

uiCompliance.workflow: Sign in, enter UPN or OneDrive URL, select destination, Scan, review, confirm, Start Copy, monitor, Open Report.
uiCompliance.startCopyGate: Enabled only after a successful current scan and explicit confirmation; source or destination changes invalidate the scan; scan currency is revalidated service-side before scheduling.
uiCompliance.unknownTotals: Indeterminate progress and Calculating/Unknown display while totals are unknown; no fabricated percentage.
uiCompliance.errorShape: Every user-facing error carries a short title, plain-language explanation, corrective action, and stable reference code; protected identifiers, tokens, URLs, and stack traces are never displayed.

statusConclusion.completionLabel: Source Implementation Complete is earned by M1–M6 source completion with mandatory Windows CI evidence; this label must not be represented as Production Ready

unexecutedChecks: WPF startup and interactive sign-in on Windows Server with a real authorized transfer account (M7)
real-tenant scan, copy, resume, reconciliation, locking, and disk-space behavior (M7)
operator review of real generated reports against a live run (M7)
limitations: The state schema (version 1) does not persist per-item error codes, error messages, or per-item start times, so the corresponding TransferReport.csv columns are emitted empty rather than fabricated; the sanitization path is implemented and test-proven. Persisting them would require a future schema-version decision.
UI behavior is validated through ViewModel tests and WPF construction tests; interactive Windows sign-in and operational review remain M7 acceptance items.
Open Report enablement trusts the orchestrator-created report directory; shell-open failures surface as reference-coded errors.
Local macOS checks were supplementary only; mandatory evidence comes from Windows CI on the exact validated commit.
